title: Time Reparametrization, Not Fractional Calculus: A Reassessment of the Conformable Derivative
comment: 20 pages, 6 figures, 1 table. Critical reassessment of conformable derivative as time reparametrization; includes theoretical equivalence proofs, ODE/PDE reformulations, Lorenz system analysis, and numerical comparisons with Caputo derivative
summary: The conformable derivative has been promoted in numerous publications as a new fractional derivative operator. This article provides a critical reassessment of this claim. We demonstrate that the conformable derivative is not a fractional operator but a useful computational tool for systems with power-law time scaling, equivalent to classical differentiation under a nonlinear time reparametrization. Several results presented in the literature as novel fractional contributions can be reinterpreted within a classical framework. We show that problems formulated using the conformable derivative can be transformed into classical formulations via a change of variable. The solution is derived classically and then transformed back, this reformulation highlights the absence of genuinely nonlocal fractional effects. We provide a theoretical analysis, numerical simulations comparing conformable, classical, and truly fractional (Caputo) models, and discuss the reasons why this misconception persists. Our results suggest that classical derivatives, as well as established fractional derivatives, offer a more faithful framework for modeling memory-dependent phenomena.

AI.tldr: 该论文批判性地重新评估了"可形变导数"作为分数阶导数算子的主张，证明其本质上是经典导数在非线性时间重参数化下的等价形式，而非真正的分数阶算子。
AI.motivation: 近年来，可形变导数在众多文献中被推广为一种新的分数阶导数算子。本文旨在批判性地重新评估这一主张，澄清其数学本质，并探讨这种误解持续存在的原因。
AI.techniques: 采用理论分析（证明可形变导数等价于经典导数在非线性时间重参数化下的形式）、变量变换方法（将可形变导数问题转化为经典问题）、数值模拟（比较可形变导数、经典导数和Caputo分数阶导数模型）。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明可形变导数不是分数阶算子，而是具有幂律时间标度的系统的计算工具；2. 展示可形变导数问题可通过变量变换转化为经典问题；3. 通过数值模拟显示可形变导数模型缺乏真正的非局部分数阶效应；4. 指出文献中许多所谓"新颖"的分数阶贡献可在经典框架下重新解释。
AI.significance: 澄清了分数阶微积分领域的一个重要概念混淆，强调了可形变导数与真正分数阶导数（如Caputo导数）的本质区别，为建模记忆依赖现象提供了更准确的数学框架，有助于该领域的理论严谨性。

title: Regularity of solutions of the Navier-Stokes-αβ equations with wall-eddy boundary conditions
summary: We establish global well-posedness and regularity for the Navier-Stokes-αβ system endowed with the wall-eddy boundary conditions proposed by Fried and Gurtin (2008). These conditions introduce a tangential vorticity traction proportional to wall vorticity and provide a continuum-mechanical model for near-wall turbulence. Our analysis begins with a variational formulation of the stationary fourth-order system, where we prove symmetry and a Gårding inequality for the associated bilinear form. We then verify Douglis-Nirenberg ellipticity and the Lopatinskii-Shapiro covering condition, establishing full Agmon-Douglis-Nirenberg regularity for the coupled system. Building on this framework, we derive a hierarchy of energy estimates for the nonlinear evolution equation, which yields global regularity, uniqueness, and stability. To our knowledge, this provides the first complete analytical treatment of the wall-eddy boundary model of Fried and Gurtin.

AI.tldr: 建立了Navier-Stokes-αβ系统在Fried和Gurtin提出的壁涡边界条件下全局适定性和正则性的完整数学理论
AI.motivation: 研究Navier-Stokes-αβ系统在Fried和Gurtin（2008）提出的壁涡边界条件下的数学理论，该边界条件引入与壁面涡度成正比的切向涡度牵引力，为近壁湍流提供连续介质力学模型
AI.techniques: 变分公式化、Gårding不等式、Douglis-Nirenberg椭圆性理论、Lopatinskii-Shapiro覆盖条件、Agmon-Douglis-Nirenberg正则性、能量估计层次结构
AI.main_theorems: 证明了稳态四阶系统的对称性和Gårding不等式，验证了Douglis-Nirenberg椭圆性和Lopatinskii-Shapiro覆盖条件，建立了耦合系统的完整Agmon-Douglis-Nirenberg正则性，推导了非线性演化方程的能量估计层次，获得了全局正则性、唯一性和稳定性
AI.significance: 首次为Fried和Gurtin的壁涡边界模型提供了完整的数学分析框架，建立了该湍流模型的严格数学基础，为近壁湍流的连续介质力学建模提供了理论保证

title: CR Yamabe Equation on the Heisenberg Group via the method of moving spheres
summary: In this paper, we classify positive solutions to the CR Yamabe equation on the Heisenberg group $\mathbb{H}^n$. We show that all such solutions are Jerison-Lee bubbles, without imposing any finite-energy or a priori symmetry assumptions. This result can be regarded as an analogue for $\mathbb{H}^n$ of the celebrated Caffarelli-Gidas-Spruck classification theorem in $\mathbb{R}^n$. To establish this, we develop a systematic approach to implement the method of moving spheres in the setting of the Heisenberg group.

AI.tldr: 在Heisenberg群上完全分类CR Yamabe方程的正解，证明所有正解都是Jerison-Lee气泡解，无需有限能量或对称性假设
AI.motivation: 研究Heisenberg群上的CR Yamabe方程正解分类问题，旨在建立类似于欧氏空间中Caffarelli-Gidas-Spruck分类定理的CR几何对应结果，解决在无有限能量或对称性假设下的完全分类问题
AI.techniques: 发展了在Heisenberg群上系统实现移动球面法的方法，这是将欧氏空间中的经典技术推广到非交换群结构的关键创新
AI.main_theorems: 证明了Heisenberg群上CR Yamabe方程的所有正解都是Jerison-Lee气泡解，这是CR几何中第一个无需有限能量或对称性假设的完全分类定理
AI.significance: 建立了CR几何中与经典欧氏空间分类定理的对应关系，为Heisenberg群上的非线性分析提供了新工具，对CR几何和亚椭圆PDE理论有重要影响

title: Finite propagation and saturation in reaction-diffusion-advection equations governed by p-Laplacian operator
summary: The paper concerns front propagation for the following mono-stable reaction-diffusion-advection equation \[f(u)u_x + g(u)u_τ= [d(u)|u_x|^{p-2} u_x]_x+ ρ(u), \quad (x,τ)\in \R\times [0,+\infty).\] Besides existence and non-existence results for traveling wave solutions, the main focus is their classification: we provide criteria to establish if they attain one or both the equilibria at a finite time and in this case, if they are continuable as $C^1$-solutions or if they are sharp solutions.

AI.tldr: 研究具有对流项的单稳态反应-扩散-对流方程的行波解存在性、不存在性及其分类
AI.motivation: 研究一类包含对流项和p-Laplacian型扩散的单稳态反应-扩散-对流方程，关注其行波解的存在性、不存在性以及解在平衡点附近的行为分类
AI.techniques: 相平面分析、常微分方程理论、行波解的存在性证明、解的渐近行为分析、p-Laplacian算子处理技术
AI.main_theorems: 建立了行波解的存在性和不存在性条件，提供了行波解在平衡点处行为的分类标准：判断解是否在有限时间内达到一个或两个平衡点，以及在这种情况下解是否可延拓为C^1解或是否为尖锐解
AI.significance: 扩展了经典反应-扩散方程的行波理论到包含对流项和p-Laplacian扩散的更一般情形，为理解这类方程的前沿传播机制提供了系统的数学框架

title: Wave dynamics governing vortex breakdown in smooth Euler flows
summary: We consider the three-dimensional incompressible Euler equations in a setting where a vortex is transported by a prescribed Lagrangian flow. We show that vortex breakdown is governed by wave dynamics generated by the underlying transport flow. The key idea is to avoid any singular integral representation of the pressure term and instead construct an effective Lagrangian coordinate system in which the associated Lie bracket vanishes identically.

AI.tldr: 通过构造有效的拉格朗日坐标系，证明三维不可压缩欧拉方程中涡旋破裂由底层输运流产生的波动力学控制
AI.motivation: 研究三维不可压缩欧拉方程中涡旋在给定拉格朗日流输运下的动力学行为，特别是涡旋破裂机制。传统方法依赖压力项的奇异积分表示，本文寻求新的分析框架来理解涡旋破裂的物理机制。
AI.techniques: 构造有效的拉格朗日坐标系，使相关的李括号恒为零；避免压力项的奇异积分表示；分析底层输运流产生的波动力学；使用几何流体力学方法处理涡旋输运问题。
AI.main_theorems: 证明在涡旋由给定拉格朗日流输运的设定下，涡旋破裂由底层输运流产生的波动力学控制；建立了涡旋破裂与波动力学之间的数学联系。
AI.significance: 为理解三维欧拉方程中涡旋破裂机制提供了新的数学框架；避免了传统奇异积分方法的困难；将涡旋动力学与波动力学联系起来，对湍流理论和流体力学稳定性分析有重要意义。

title: The fibre operators in the Bloch-Floquet decomposition of periodic magnetic pseudo-differential operators
summary: We study the structure of the fibre operators corresponding to periodic magnetic pseudo-differential operators having periodic magnetic potentials. We obtain explicit formulas for their distribution kernel, both when these fibres are seen as operators on the $d$-dimensional torus, and also when they are seen as infinite matrices acting on a discrete $\ell^2$ space via a discrete Fourier transform. Moreover, using these distribution kernels we prove that the fibre operators are toroidal pseudo-differential operators.

AI.tldr: 证明了周期磁势伪微分算子的纤维算子具有明确的分布核表达式，并证明它们是环面伪微分算子
AI.motivation: 研究具有周期磁势的周期磁伪微分算子的纤维算子结构，这是量子力学和凝聚态物理中周期势场问题的重要数学工具
AI.techniques: 使用分布核方法、离散傅里叶变换、环面伪微分算子理论，以及将纤维算子表示为无限矩阵的技术
AI.main_theorems: 获得了纤维算子在d维环面上和通过离散傅里叶变换在离散ℓ²空间上的分布核的显式公式，并证明了纤维算子是环面伪微分算子
AI.significance: 为周期磁势系统的谱分析和Bloch-Floquet理论提供了严格的数学基础，在固体物理和量子力学中有重要应用

title: On a Thermodynamically Consistent Diffuse-Interface Model for Incompressible Two-Phase Flows with Chemotaxis and Mass Transport
summary: We investigate a hydrodynamic system of Navier--Stokes/Cahn--Hilliard type, which describes the motion of a two-phase flow of two incompressible fluids with unmatched densities coupled with a soluble chemical species. Derived from Onsager's variational principle, this thermodynamically consistent diffuse-interface model incorporates both the chemotaxis effects induced by the chemical species and the mass transport processes within the mixture. For the two-dimensional initial-boundary value problem, we establish the existence of global finite energy solutions and global weak solutions, using a suitable approximation scheme combined with compactness methods. Next, by carefully analyzing three decoupled subsystems and employing a bootstrap argument, we prove the existence and uniqueness of a global strong solution for sufficiently regular initial data, as well as the propagation of regularity for global weak solutions. In particular, we show that the density of the chemical substance stays bounded for all time if its initial datum is bounded. This implies a significant distinction from the classical Keller--Segel system: diffusion driven by the chemical potential gradient can prevent the formation of concentration singularities.

AI.tldr: 建立了Navier-Stokes/Cahn-Hilliard型两相流与可溶性化学物质耦合系统的全局解存在性理论，揭示了化学势梯度扩散可防止浓度奇异性形成
AI.motivation: 研究具有不匹配密度的两种不可压缩流体与可溶性化学物质耦合的两相流系统，该模型从Onsager变分原理导出，具有热力学一致性，包含化学趋化效应和混合物中的质量输运过程
AI.techniques: 采用合适的逼近格式结合紧致性方法建立全局有限能量解和弱解；通过仔细分析三个解耦子系统并运用自举论证证明强解存在唯一性；分析化学物质密度有界性
AI.main_theorems: 1. 二维初边值问题全局有限能量解和全局弱解的存在性；2. 充分正则初始数据下全局强解的存在唯一性；3. 全局弱解的正则性传播；4. 化学物质密度若初始有界则始终有界
AI.significance: 揭示了与经典Keller-Segel系统的显著区别：化学势梯度驱动的扩散可以防止浓度奇异性的形成，为两相流与化学物质耦合系统的数学理论提供了重要进展

title: Dispersive estimates for discrete Klein-Gordon equations on one-dimensional lattice with quasi-periodic potentials
summary: We prove $\ell^{1}\!\to\!\ell^{\infty}$ dispersive estimates for the discrete Klein--Gordon equation on $\mathbb Z$ with small real-analytic quasi-periodic potentials, showing that the time-decay rate persists as $(\tfrac13)^{-}$. As applications, we derive the corresponding Strichartz estimates and establish small-data global well-posedness for the associated nonlinear discrete Klein--Gordon equation.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有小实解析准周期势的离散Klein-Gordon方程的ℓ¹→ℓ∞色散估计，时间衰减率保持为(1/3)⁻
AI.motivation: 研究离散Klein-Gordon方程在准周期势下的色散性质，这类问题在数学物理中具有重要意义，特别是在理解离散系统波传播的长时间行为方面
AI.techniques: 实解析准周期势理论、色散估计方法、Strichartz估计技术、小参数扰动分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. ℓ¹→ℓ∞色散估计：证明时间衰减率为(1/3)⁻；2. 相应的Strichartz估计；3. 关联非线性离散Klein-Gordon方程的小初值整体适定性
AI.significance: 为离散Klein-Gordon方程在准周期势下的波传播理论提供了严格数学基础，建立了色散估计的鲁棒性，并为非线性问题的研究开辟了新途径

title: Ground states of the Schrödinger equation coupled with fourth-order gravitation -- Part 1: the case $K_{a, b} \leq 0$
summary: We are interested in the existence and asymptotic behavior of ground states of the following normalized nonlocal semilinear problem: \[ \begin{cases} - Δu + (V - ω) u + (K_{a, b} \ast u^2) u = 0 &\text{in} ~ \mathbb{R}^3; \\ \|u\|_{\mathscr{L}^2}^2 = μ, \end{cases} \] where \[ K_{a, b} (x) := \frac{1}{|x|} \left( \frac{4}{3} e^{- b |x|} - \frac{1}{3} e^{- a |x|} - 1 \right); \] $0 \leq a, b \leq \infty$; $V$ denotes a singular potential that vanishes at infinity and the unknowns are $ω\in \mathbb{R}$, $u \colon \mathbb{R}^3 \to \mathbb{R}$. This problem is obtained by looking for standing waves of the Schrödinger equation coupled with the nonrelativistic gravitational potential prescribed by a family of fourth-order gravity theories. In this paper, (i) we obtain a complete picture of the existence/nonexistence of ground states of the associated autonomous problem for every possible geometry of $K_{a, b}$, (ii) we obtain conditions that ensure the existence of ground states of the nonautonomous problem when $K_{a, b} \leq 0$ and (iii) we prove that as \[ (a, b) \to (A, B) \in \left\{(0, 0), (\infty, \infty), (0, \infty)\right\}, \] ground states of this problem respectively converge to a ground state of (1) the Schrödinger equation, (2) the Choquard equation and (3) a rescaling of the Choquard equation.

AI.tldr: 研究了四阶引力理论中薛定谔方程与引力势耦合的归一化非局部半线性问题基态解的存在性、不存在性及渐近行为
AI.motivation: 研究四阶引力理论中薛定谔方程与非相对论引力势耦合的驻波解，该问题来源于物理中引力修正理论，核函数K_{a,b}参数变化对应不同引力理论极限情况
AI.techniques: 使用变分法、集中紧性原理、非局部非线性分析、极限分析技术，处理奇异势能和参数依赖的核函数
AI.main_theorems: 1) 完全刻画了自治问题基态解存在/不存在的参数区域；2) 给出了非自治问题在K_{a,b}≤0时基态解存在的条件；3) 证明了当参数趋于三种极限时，基态解分别收敛到薛定谔方程、Choquard方程及其缩放形式的基态解
AI.significance: 建立了四阶引力理论中薛定谔-引力耦合系统的严格数学理论，统一处理了从经典薛定谔方程到Choquard型非局部方程的连续过渡，为引力修正理论提供了数学基础

title: Asymptotic behavior of a nonlinear shallow shell model when the shell becomes a plate
summary: This paper studies a nonlinear shallow shell model proposed by Donnell, Vlasov, Mushtari, Galimov, and Koiter. More specifically, we address the question concerning the asymptotic behavior of minimizing solutions. Our result can be applied to general applied forces. Thus, it substantially extends the one given in \cite{oana2} whereby the tangential components of the applied forces are assumed to vanish.

AI.tldr: 研究了Donnell-Vlasov-Mushtari-Galimov-Koiter非线性浅壳模型中极小化解的渐近行为，将先前结果推广到一般外力情形
AI.motivation: 研究非线性浅壳模型的渐近行为，特别是极小化解在一般外力作用下的极限行为，扩展了先前仅考虑法向外力的结果
AI.techniques: 渐近分析、变分方法、极小化序列分析、壳理论中的能量估计
AI.main_theorems: 建立了在一般外力作用下非线性浅壳模型极小化解的渐近收敛性定理，证明了当壳厚度趋于零时解的极限行为
AI.significance: 将壳理论中的渐近分析从特殊外力情形推广到一般情形，为工程应用中的壳结构分析提供了更完整的理论基础

title: Global Martingale Entropy Solutions to the Stochastic Isentropic Euler Equations
summary: We establish the existence and compactness of global martingale entropy solutions with finite relative-energy for the stochastically forced system of isentropic Euler equations governed by a general pressure law. To achieve these, a stochastic compensated compactness framework in $L^p$ is developed to overcome the difficulty that the uniform $L^{\infty}$ bound for the stochastic approximate solutions is unavailable, owing to the stochastic forcing term. The convergence of the vanishing viscosity method is established by employing the stochastic compactness framework, along with careful uniform estimates of the stochastic approximate solutions, to obtain the existence of global martingale entropy solutions with finite relative-energy. In particular, in the polytropic pressure case for all adiabatic exponents, we prove that the global solutions satisfy the local mechanical energy inequality when the initial data are only required to have finite relative-energy (while the higher moment estimates for entropy are not required here, as needed in the earlier work). Higher-order relative energy estimates for approximate solutions are also derived to establish the entropy inequality for more convex entropy pairs and to then prove the compactness of solutions to the stochastic isentropic Euler system. The stochastic compensated compactness framework and the uniform estimate techniques for approximate solutions developed in this paper should be useful in the study of other similar problems.

AI.tldr: 建立了随机强迫等熵欧拉系统有限相对能量全局鞅熵解的存在性和紧致性，并发展了随机补偿紧致性框架。
AI.motivation: 研究随机强迫等熵欧拉系统，由于随机强迫项导致近似解缺乏一致L∞界，需要克服这一困难建立全局解的存在性和紧致性理论。
AI.techniques: 发展了Lp空间中的随机补偿紧致性框架，使用消失粘性法，进行随机近似解的一致估计，推导高阶相对能量估计。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了有限相对能量全局鞅熵解的存在性；在多方压力情形下证明了局部机械能量不等式；建立了随机等熵欧拉系统解的紧致性。
AI.significance: 为随机双曲守恒律系统提供了新的分析框架，发展了随机补偿紧致性理论，对类似随机偏微分方程问题具有广泛应用价值。

title: Blowup rate for rotational NLS with a repulsive potential
summary: In this paper we give an analytical proof of the ``$\log$-$\log$'' blowup rate for mass-critical nonlinear Schrödinger equation (NLS) with a rotation ($Ω\neq 0$) and a repulsive harmonic potential $V_γ(x) = \textrm{sgn}(γ) γ^2 |x|^2$, $γ< 0$ when the initial data has a mass slightly above that of $Q$, the ground state solution to the free NLS. The proof is based on a virial identity and an $\mathcal{R}_γ$-transform, a pseudo-conformal transform in this setting. Further, we obtain a limiting behavior description concerning the mass concentration near blowup time. A remarkable finding is that increasing the value $|γ|$ for the repulsive potential $V_γ$ can give rise to global in time solution for the focusing RNLS, which is in contrast to the case where $γ$ is positive. This kind of phenomenon was earlier observed in the non-rotational case $Ω= 0$ in Carles' work. In addition, we provide numerical simulations to partially illustrate the blowup profile along with the blowup rate using dynamic rescaling and adaptive mesh refinement method.

AI.tldr: 证明了带旋转和排斥谐振势的质量临界非线性薛定谔方程的"log-log"爆破速率，并发现增加排斥势强度可产生全局解
AI.motivation: 研究带旋转和排斥谐振势的质量临界非线性薛定谔方程(RNLS)的爆破行为，特别关注初始质量略高于自由NLS基态解Q时的爆破速率和爆破机制
AI.techniques: 基于virial恒等式和$\mathcal{R}_γ$-变换(该设置下的伪共形变换)，使用动态重标度和自适应网格细化方法进行数值模拟
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了"log-log"爆破速率；2. 获得了爆破时刻附近质量集中的极限行为描述；3. 发现增加排斥势强度$|γ|$可产生全局解
AI.significance: 首次在带旋转的RNLS中严格证明了"log-log"爆破速率，揭示了排斥势对爆破行为的抑制效应，为理解旋转BEC中的爆破现象提供了理论依据

title: Crystalline Motion of discrete interfaces in the Blume-Emery-Griffiths Model: partial wetting
summary: We continue the variational study of the discrete-to-continuum evolution of lattice systems of Blume-Emery-Griffith type which model two immiscible phases in the presence of a surfactant. In our previous work \cite{CFS}, we analyzed the case of a completely wetted crystal and described how the interplay between surfactant evaporation and mass conservation leads to a transition between crystalline mean curvature flow and pinned evolutions. In the present paper, we extend the analysis to the regime of partial wetting, where the surfactant occupies only a portion of the interface. Within the minimizing-movements scheme, we rigorously derive the continuum evolution and show how partial wetting introduces a complex coupling between interfacial motion and redistribution of surfactant. The resulting evolution exhibits new features absent in the fully wetted case, including the coexistence of moving and pinned facets or the emergence and long-lived metastable states. This provides, to our knowledge, the first discrete-to-continuum variational description of partially wetted crystalline interfaces, bridging the gap between microscopic lattice models and experimentally observed surfactant-induced pinning phenomena in immiscible systems.

AI.tldr: 建立了部分润湿条件下Blume-Emery-Griffith晶格系统的离散到连续变分演化理论，揭示了表面活性剂分布与界面运动的复杂耦合机制
AI.motivation: 研究两种不混溶相在表面活性剂存在下的晶格系统演化，扩展之前完全润湿情况的分析，探索部分润湿条件下表面活性剂仅占据部分界面的复杂动力学
AI.techniques: 变分方法、最小运动方案(minimizing-movements scheme)、离散到连续极限分析、晶格系统建模、界面演化理论
AI.main_theorems: 在最小运动方案框架下严格推导了连续演化方程，揭示了部分润湿条件下界面运动与表面活性剂重新分布的复杂耦合，发现了移动与钉扎晶面共存、亚稳态等新现象
AI.significance: 首次提供了部分润湿晶格界面的离散到连续变分描述，建立了微观晶格模型与实验观测的表面活性剂诱导钉扎现象之间的桥梁，对理解不混溶系统中的界面动力学有重要理论意义

title: Refined Limiting Profiles of the Principal Eigenvalue Problems with Large Advection
summary: In this paper, we are concerned with the following eigenvalue problem with an advection term: \begin{equation}\label{0.1} \left\{ \begin{split} -εΔφ-2α\nabla m(x)\cdot\nabla φ+V(x)φ&=λφ \ \text{in}\ \ Ω,\\ φ&=0\ \ \hbox{on}\ \ \partialΩ, ~~~\text{(0.1)} \end{split} \right. \end{equation} where $Ω\subset\mathbb{R}^N~(N\geq1)$ satisfying $\partialΩ\in C^{2}$ is a bounded domain and contains the origin as an interior point, the constants $ε>0$ and $α>0$ are the diffusive and advection coefficients, respectively, and $m(x)\in C^{2}(\barΩ)$, $V (x)\in C^γ(\barΩ)~(0<γ<1)$ are given functions. We analyze the refined limiting profiles of the principal eigenpair $(λ, φ)$ for (0.1) as $α\rightarrow\infty$, which display the visible effect of the large advection on $(λ, φ)$. It expects that our argument is applicable to investigating the refined expansions of the general principal eigenvalue problems.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了带对流项的特征值问题在大对流系数极限下的主特征对精细化渐近展开
AI.motivation: 研究带有对流项的特征值问题在大对流系数极限下的渐近行为，揭示大对流对主特征值和特征函数的精细化影响
AI.techniques: 渐近分析、边界层理论、特征值问题分析、椭圆偏微分方程理论
AI.main_theorems: 建立了主特征对(λ, φ)当α→∞时的精细化极限剖面，给出了特征值和特征函数的渐近展开公式
AI.significance: 为带对流项的特征值问题提供了系统的渐近分析框架，对理解大对流效应有重要理论意义，方法可推广到一般主特征值问题

title: Diffusion wave phenomena and optimal time decay for incompressible viscoelastic flows
summary: Motivated by the work of D. Hoff and K. Zumbrun (Indiana Univ. Math. J. 44: 603-676, 1995), we investigate the diffusion wave phenomena in three-dimensional incompressible viscoelastic flows. By employing the representation formula of the wave equation and the stationary phase methods on the sphere $\mathbb{S}^{d-1}$, we establish $L^p$ decay estimates for the solution over the whole range $1\leq p \leq \infty$, which reveals the hyperbolic nature of the incompressible viscoelastic flows.

AI.tldr: 建立了三维不可压缩粘弹性流动中扩散波的L^p衰减估计，揭示了流动的双曲特性
AI.motivation: 受D. Hoff和K. Zumbrun关于扩散波现象研究的启发，研究三维不可压缩粘弹性流动中的扩散波现象，这类流动具有双曲-抛物耦合特性
AI.techniques: 使用波动方程表示公式和球面S^{d-1}上的平稳相位方法，建立L^p衰减估计
AI.main_theorems: 建立了三维不可压缩粘弹性流动解在整个范围1≤p≤∞上的L^p衰减估计，揭示了流动的双曲特性
AI.significance: 揭示了不可压缩粘弹性流动的双曲本质，为理解这类复杂流体的长时间行为提供了理论框架，对流体力学和材料科学有重要意义

title: Determining habitat anomalies in cross-diffusion predator-prey chemotaxis models
comment: 27 pages Key words:Inverse boundary value problems, multi-species cross-diffusion predator-prey chemotaxis models, habitat degradation, anomaly detection, unique identifiability
summary: This paper addresses an open inverse problem at the interface of mathematical analysis and spatial ecology: the unique identification of unknown spatial anomalies -- interpreted as zones of habitat degradation -- and their associated ecological parameters in multi-species predator-prey systems with multiple chemical signals, using only boundary measurements. We formulate the problem as the simultaneous recovery of an unknown interior subdomain and discontinuous ecological interaction rules across its boundary. A unified theooretical framework is developed that unique determines both the anomaly's geometry and discontinuous coefficients characterizing the altered interactions within the degraded region. Our results cover smooth anomalies in time-dependent systems and are extended to non-smooth polyhedral inclusions in stationary regimes. This work bridges a gap between ecological sensing and the quantitative inference of internal habitat heterogeneity, offering a mathamtical basis for detecting and characterizing habitat degradation from limited external data.

AI.tldr: 建立了从边界测量唯一识别多物种捕食-被捕食系统中未知空间异常区域及其生态参数的理论框架
AI.motivation: 解决数学分析与空间生态学交叉领域的一个开放逆问题：仅通过边界测量识别多物种捕食-被捕食系统中未知的空间异常区域（栖息地退化区）及其生态参数
AI.techniques: 逆问题理论、边界测量方法、不连续系数恢复、几何形状识别、时变系统与稳态系统的统一分析框架
AI.main_theorems: 建立了同时恢复未知内部子域及其边界上不连续生态相互作用规则的理论框架，证明了异常区域几何形状和不连续系数的唯一可确定性，结果覆盖光滑异常时变系统和非光滑多面体稳态系统
AI.significance: 填补了生态传感与内部栖息地异质性定量推断之间的空白，为从有限外部数据检测和表征栖息地退化提供了数学基础，连接了数学分析与生态学应用

title: Standing waves of the Anderson-Gross-Pitaevskii equation
summary: In this paper, we study standing waves for the Anderson-Gross-Pitaevskii equation in dimension 1 and 2. The Anderson-Gross-Pitaevskii equation is a nonlinear Schrödinger equation with a confining potential and a multiplicative spatial white noise. Standing waves are characterized by a profile which is invariant by the dynamic and solves a nonlinear elliptic equation with spatial white noise potential. We construct such solutions via variational methods and obtain some results on their regularity, localization and stability.

AI.tldr: 构造了Anderson-Gross-Pitaevskii方程在1维和2维中的驻波解，并研究了其正则性、局域化和稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究具有约束势和乘性空间白噪声的非线性薛定谔方程（Anderson-Gross-Pitaevskii方程）的驻波解，这类方程在量子物理和玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 变分方法、非线性椭圆方程理论、随机分析、白噪声处理技术
AI.main_theorems: 通过变分方法构造了驻波解，获得了关于解的正则性、局域化性质以及稳定性的结果
AI.significance: 为具有随机势的非线性薛定谔方程的驻波解理论提供了新结果，对理解无序介质中的波动力学有重要意义

title: Derivation of nonlinear time-dependent macroscopic conductivity for an electropermeabilization model via homogenization
summary: We study a phenomenological electropermeabilization model in a periodic medium representing biological tissue. Starting from a cell-level model describing the electric potential and the degree of porosity, we perform dimension analysis to identify a relevant scaling in terms of a small parameter $\ve$ - the ratio between the cell and the tissue size. The electric potential satisfies electrostatic equations in the extra- and intracellular domains, while its jump across the cell membrane evolves according to a nonlinear law coupled with an ordinary differential equation for the porosity degree. We prove the well-posedness of the microscopic problem, derive a priori estimates, obtain formal asymptotics, and rigorously justify the expansion combining two-scale convergence with monotonicity arguments. The resulting macroscopic model exhibits memory effects and a nonlinear, time-dependent effective current. It captures the nontrivial evolution of effective conductivity, including a characteristic drop reflecting the capacitive behavior of the lipid bilayer, in agreement with experimental data. Numerical computations of the effective conductivity confirm that, although microscopic conductivity is constant, tissue conductivity varies nonlinearly with electric field strength, showing a sigmoid trend. This suggests a rigorous mathematical explanation for experimentally observed conductivity dynamics.

AI.tldr: 建立了生物组织电穿孔现象的多尺度数学模型，通过两尺度收敛和单调性论证严格推导出具有记忆效应和非线性有效电流的宏观模型。
AI.motivation: 研究生物组织中的电穿孔现象，这是一种在强电场作用下细胞膜通透性增加的过程，对电穿孔治疗和电转染等生物医学应用至关重要。需要从微观细胞模型推导出宏观组织模型来解释实验观察到的非线性电导率变化。
AI.techniques: 使用多尺度渐近分析，结合两尺度收敛理论和单调性论证；进行维度分析识别小参数ε（细胞与组织尺寸比）；建立微观问题的适定性，推导先验估计，进行形式渐近展开。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了微观问题的适定性，推导了先验估计，通过严格的两尺度收敛和单调性论证得到了具有记忆效应和非线性时间依赖有效电流的宏观模型，该模型能捕捉有效电导率的非平凡演化。
AI.significance: 为实验观察到的组织电导率非线性变化提供了严格的数学解释，揭示了微观恒定电导率如何导致宏观非线性响应，对电穿孔治疗优化和生物组织电特性建模有重要理论意义。

title: Guillarmou's Normal Operator for Magnetic and Thermostat Flows
summary: Guillarmou's normal operator over a closed Anosov manifold is analogous to the classical normal operator of the geodesic X-ray transform over manifolds with boundary. In this paper, we generalize this normal operator, under some dynamical assumptions, to thermostat flows as well as to the case of the magnetic flows. In particular, we show that these generalized normal operators are elliptic pseudodifferential operators of order -1 in each case. As an application, we prove a stability estimate for the magnetic X-ray transform.

AI.tldr: 将Guillarmou的正常算子推广到热力计流和磁流，证明其为-1阶椭圆伪微分算子，并应用于磁X射线变换的稳定性估计
AI.motivation: Guillarmou在闭Anosov流形上定义的正则算子类似于边界流形上测地线X射线变换的经典正则算子。本文旨在将这一算子推广到更一般的动力学系统：热力计流和磁流，并研究其性质和应用。
AI.techniques: 使用椭圆伪微分算子理论、动力学系统方法（特别是Anosov假设）、泛函分析技术，以及X射线变换的稳定性估计方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在适当动力学假设下，将正则算子推广到热力计流和磁流；2. 证明这些推广的正则算子是-1阶椭圆伪微分算子；3. 作为应用，建立了磁X射线变换的稳定性估计
AI.significance: 扩展了Guillarmou正则算子的适用范围，为更一般动力学系统上的X射线变换理论提供了分析工具，在逆问题和几何分析中有重要应用，特别是磁流相关问题的稳定性分析

title: Qualitative analysis on the critical points of the Kirchhoff-Routh function
summary: In this paper, we study the number of critical points of the Kirchhoff-Routh function \begin{equation*} \mathcal{KR}_D(x,y)=Λ_1^2\mathcal{R}_D(x)+Λ_2^2\mathcal{R}_D(y)-2Λ_1Λ_2G_D(x,y), \end{equation*} where $D$ is a bounded domain in $\mathbb{R}^2$, $x,y\in D$, $Λ_1,Λ_2>0$, $\mathcal{R}_D$ is the Robin function, and $G_D$ is the Green function of the operator $-Δ$ with $0$ Dirichlet boundary condition on $D$. This function arises from concentration phenomena in nonlinear elliptic problems and from the de-singularization problem for the steady Euler equation. For domains with a small hole, we establish not only the exact number and the location of the critical points of $\mathcal{KR}_D$, but also their nondegeneracy. We show that the location of the hole plays a crucial role. Finally in the context of elliptic problems, we establish the existence of multiple two-peak solutions.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了带小孔的有界区域中Kirchhoff-Routh函数的临界点数量、位置和非退化性，并建立了多峰解的存在性。
AI.motivation: Kirchhoff-Routh函数来源于非线性椭圆问题的集中现象和稳态欧拉方程的去奇化问题，研究其临界点对理解涡旋动力学和椭圆问题的多峰解有重要意义。
AI.techniques: 使用小孔扰动方法、Robin函数和Green函数的渐近分析、临界点理论和非退化性分析，结合椭圆问题的变分框架。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了带小孔区域中Kirchhoff-Routh函数临界点的精确数量、位置和非退化性，证明了位置对临界点的影响，并在椭圆问题中建立了多两峰解的存在性。
AI.significance: 为涡旋动力学和椭圆问题的多峰解提供了严格的数学基础，揭示了几何扰动对临界点结构的影响，发展了处理奇异性问题的新方法。

title: Global strong solutions for non-isothermal compressible nematic liquid crystal flows under a scaling-invariant smallness condition
summary:
We study the three-dimensional Cauchy problem for a non-isothermal compressible nematic liquid crystal system with far-field vacuum. By deriving refined energy estimates and exploiting the coupled structure of the equations, we establish the global existence and uniqueness of strong solutions, provided that the following scaling-invariant quantity is sufficiently small:
  $$
  \big(1+\barρ+\tfrac{1}{\barρ}\big)
  \big[\|ρ_{0}\|_{L^{3}}+(\barρ^{2}+\barρ)\big(\|\sqrt{ρ_{0}}u_{0}\|_{L^{2}}^{2}+\|\nabla d_{0}\|_{L^{2}}^{2}\big)\big]
  \big[\|\nabla u_{0}\|_{L^{2}}^{2}+(\barρ+1)\|\sqrt{ρ_{0}}θ_{0}\|_{L^{2}}^{2}
  +\|\nabla^{2} d_{0}\|_{L^{2}}^{2}+\|\nabla d_{0}\|_{L^{4}}^{4}\big].
  $$
  In particular, our result identifies a new scaling-invariant quantity and does not impose additional restrictions on the viscosity coefficients, which improves previous work (Commun. Math. Sci. 21 (2023), 1455--1486).

AI.tldr: 建立了非等温可压缩向列相液晶系统在远场真空条件下的三维柯西问题全局强解的存在唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究三维非等温可压缩向列相液晶系统的柯西问题，该系统在远场真空条件下具有复杂的耦合结构，需要处理密度、速度、方向和温度之间的相互作用
AI.techniques: 推导精细的能量估计，利用方程的耦合结构，建立新的尺度不变量的能量估计框架
AI.main_theorems: 当特定的尺度不变量足够小时，建立了全局强解的存在唯一性，该不变量包含初始密度、速度、方向和温度的各种范数
AI.significance: 改进了先前工作（Commun. Math. Sci. 21 (2023)），识别了新的尺度不变量，且不对粘性系数施加额外限制，对液晶流体动力学理论有重要贡献

title: Local well-posedness of the Schrödinger flow into $\mathbb{S}^2$ with natural boundary conditions
summary: In this paper, we develop a new approximation scheme to resolve the local well-posedness problem for the Landau-Lifshitz equation (i.e., the Schrödinger flow into the standard unit 2-sphere $\mathbb{S}^2\subset \mathbb{R}^3$) with natural boundary conditions.

AI.tldr: 提出新的逼近方案解决带自然边界条件的Landau-Lifshitz方程局部适定性问题
AI.motivation: 研究Landau-Lifshitz方程（即进入标准单位2-球面S²的Schrödinger流）在自然边界条件下的局部适定性问题，这是磁性材料动力学中的重要数学模型
AI.techniques: 开发新的逼近方案，可能涉及正则化方法、能量估计、紧性论证或调和映射理论中的技术
AI.main_theorems: 建立了带自然边界条件的Landau-Lifshitz方程的局部适定性结果，证明了在适当函数空间中解的存在唯一性
AI.significance: 为磁性材料动力学中的关键方程提供了严格的数学基础，扩展了调和映射流理论，对偏微分方程理论和数学物理有重要意义

title: Infinitely many positive solutions to nonlinear scalar field equation with nonsmooth nonlinearity

AI.tldr: 首次将局部变分方法应用于非光滑泛函，证明了非对称非周期势能下对数标量场方程存在无穷多正解
AI.motivation: 研究对数标量场方程及其具有规定L^2范数的对应问题，这些方程来自物理相关情境。主要挑战是对数非线性项的非光滑性质，使得能量泛函在H^1(R^N)上不是C^1类，无法直接应用标准临界点理论。
AI.techniques: 非光滑临界点理论、局部变分方法、max-min论证；首次将局部变分方法应用于非光滑泛函；处理非对称非周期势能的衰减条件
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对于问题(P)：使用纯变分方法建立了具有有限或无限多个"凸起"的多凸起正解的存在性；2. 对于归一化问题(P_N)：证明了具有有限数量凸起的归一化多凸起正解的存在性
AI.significance: 首次成功将局部变分方法应用于非光滑泛函，为处理对数非线性等非光滑问题提供了新框架；对非对称非周期势能下的对数标量场方程解结构有深入理解；为物理中相关模型提供了数学基础

title: Global stability and asymptotic behavior for incompressible ideal MHD equations with velocity damping term
summary: In this article, we study the stability and large time behavior for an multi-dimensional incompressible magnetohydrodynamical system with a velocity damping term, for small perturbations near a steady-state of magnetic field fulfilling the Diophantine condition. Our results mathematically characterize the background magnetic field exerts the stabilizing effect, and bridge the gap left by previous work with respect to the asymptotic behavior in time. Our proof approach mainly relies on the Fourier analysis and energy estimates. In addition, we provide a versatile analytical framework applicable to many other partially dissipative fluid models.

AI.tldr: 研究了带速度阻尼项的多维不可压缩磁流体力学系统在满足Diophantine条件的稳态磁场附近小扰动下的稳定性和长时间行为。
AI.motivation: 研究磁流体力学系统中背景磁场的稳定效应，填补先前工作中关于时间渐近行为的空白，为理解磁场在流体稳定性中的作用提供数学刻画。
AI.techniques: 主要采用傅里叶分析和能量估计方法，建立了一个适用于多种部分耗散流体模型的通用分析框架。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在满足Diophantine条件的稳态磁场附近，带速度阻尼项的多维不可压缩磁流体力学系统的小扰动具有稳定性和特定的长时间渐近行为。
AI.significance: 数学上刻画了背景磁场的稳定效应，填补了该领域在时间渐近行为方面的理论空白，为研究部分耗散流体模型提供了通用的分析框架。

title: On blow-up rate for the Hénon parabolic equation with Sobolev supercritical nonlinearity
summary: We discuss the Hénon parabolic equation $\partial_t u = Δu + |x|^σu^p$ in a finite ball in $\mathbb{R}^N$ under the Dirichlet boundary condition, where $N\ge1$, $p>1$, and $σ>0$. We assume that the exponent $p$ is supercritical in the Sobolev sense. Since the spatial potential term $|x|^σ$ vanishes at the origin, solutions seem less likely to blow up at the origin. We construct a solution that blows up at the origin and also carry out an analysis of blow-up rate of solutions. In particular, if $p$ is less than the Joseph--Lundgren exponent, all blow-ups are shown to be of Type I. The lower bound corresponding to Type I rate is also shown for some particular blow-up solutions. As by products, we present a basic result on classification to threshold solutions for every $p>1+σ/N$.

AI.tldr: 构造了Hénon抛物方程在Sobolev超临界情形下在原点爆破的解，并分析了爆破速率，证明了当p小于Joseph-Lundgren指数时所有爆破都是Type I型。
AI.motivation: 研究Hénon抛物方程在有限球域中的爆破行为，特别关注空间势项|x|^σ在原点消失的特性如何影响解的爆破位置和速率，解决超临界指数情形下的爆破分析问题。
AI.techniques: 使用爆破构造方法、爆破速率分析、Type I/II型爆破分类、Joseph-Lundgren指数比较、阈值解分类等技巧，结合抛物方程理论和奇异势项分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 构造了在原点爆破的解；2. 证明了当p小于Joseph-Lundgren指数时所有爆破都是Type I型；3. 给出了Type I速率的下界估计；4. 提供了p>1+σ/N时阈值解的分类结果。
AI.significance: 深入理解了奇异势项对抛物方程爆破行为的影响，特别是势项在原点消失时爆破位置的选择机制，为Hénon型方程的超临界爆破理论提供了重要进展。

title: Ground States for the Nonlinear Schr{ö}dinger Equation on Open Books and Dimensional Reduction to Metric Graphs
summary: In this work, we study the dimensional reduction of stationary states in the shrinking limit for a broad class of two-dimensional domains, called open books, to their counterparts on metric graphs. An open book is a two-dimensional structure formed by rectangular domains sharing common boundaries. We first develop a functional-analytic framework suited to variational problems on open books and establish the existence of solutions as constrained action minimizers. For graph-based open books (i.e., those isomorphic to the product of a graph with an interval) we prove the existence of a sharp transition in the dimensionality of ground states. Specifically, there exists a critical transverse width: below this threshold, all ground states coincide with the ground states on the underlying graph trivially extended in the transverse direction; above it, ground states become genuinely two-dimensional.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了二维开书结构在收缩极限下稳态的维数约化问题，发现了度量图上基态维数的临界转变现象。
AI.motivation: 研究二维开书结构（由共享边界的矩形域组成）在收缩极限下稳态的维数约化问题，探索从二维域到度量图的约化过程中基态行为的转变。
AI.techniques: 发展了适用于开书上变分问题的泛函分析框架，使用约束作用最小化方法证明解的存在性，分析临界横向宽度下的维数转变。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了开书上变分问题的解存在性定理；对于图基开书，证明了基态维数的尖锐转变：存在临界横向宽度，低于该阈值时所有基态与底层图的基态一致（平凡横向延拓），高于该阈值时基态变为真正的二维结构。
AI.significance: 为高维结构到低维图的维数约化提供了严格的数学框架，揭示了临界尺度下基态行为的相变现象，对理解复杂几何结构上的变分问题有重要理论意义。

title: Normalized solutions of nonlinear magnetic Schrödinger equations on metric graphs
summary: In this paper we first establish the theory of a magnetic Sobolev space $H^1_A(\mathcal{G},\mathbb{C})$ on metric graphs $\mathcal{G}$ and we prove the self-adjointness of its corresponding magnetic Schrödinger operator. Then, in this setting, we investigate the existence and multiplicity of normalized solutions to nonlinear magnetic Schrödinger equations on compact metric graphs and on noncompact metric graphs with localized nonlinearities or nonlinearities acting on whole metric graphs, covering the mass-subcritical, mass-critical, and mass-supercritical cases.

AI.tldr: 建立了度量图上磁Sobolev空间理论，证明了磁Schrödinger算子的自伴性，并研究了非线性磁Schrödinger方程在度量图上的归一化解的存在性和多重性。
AI.motivation: 研究度量图（metric graphs）上的非线性磁Schr\"odinger方程，这是量子图理论和非线性波方程交叉领域的重要问题。度量图作为一维分岔结构的数学模型，在量子网络、纳米结构、光波导等物理应用中具有重要意义。磁场的引入增加了问题的物理相关性和数学复杂性。
AI.techniques: 1. 建立了度量图上的磁Sobolev空间理论；2. 证明了磁Schr\"odinger算子的自伴性；3. 使用变分方法、集中紧性原理、山路引理等非线性分析技术；4. 处理了紧度量图和非紧度量图的不同情况；5. 考虑了局部非线性作用和全局非线性作用；6. 覆盖了质量次临界、质量临界和质量超临界三种情况。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 磁Sobolev空间$H^1_A(\mathcal{G},\mathbb{C})$的理论构建；2. 对应磁Schr\"odinger算子的自伴性证明；3. 在紧度量图和非紧度量图上非线性磁Schr\"odinger方程归一化解的存在性和多重性结果；4. 针对局部非线性、全局非线性以及不同质量临界性情况的分类定理。
AI.significance: 1. 扩展了量子图理论到含磁场的非线性情况；2. 为量子网络中的非线性波传播提供了数学基础；3. 发展了度量图上的磁Sobolev空间理论，填补了理论空白；4. 归一化解的研究与物理中的质量守恒问题直接相关；5. 结果在纳米结构、光波导、量子计算等物理应用中具有潜在价值。

title: Solutions of the singular Yamabe problem near singular boundaries
summary: In this paper, we investigate the asymptotic behaviors of solutions to the singular Yamabe problem with negative constant scalar curvature near singular boundaries and derive optimal estimates, where the background metrics are not assumed to be conformally flat. Specifically, we demonstrate that for a wide class of Lipschitz domains with asymptotic conical structure, the local positive solutions are well approximated by the positive solutions in the tangent cones at singular boundary points. This extends the results of [10, 12, 26].

AI.tldr: 研究非共形平坦背景下奇异Yamabe问题负常数标量曲率解在奇异边界附近的渐近行为，并得到最优估计
AI.motivation: 奇异Yamabe问题在几何分析中具有重要意义，研究解在奇异边界附近的渐近行为有助于理解解的局部结构。先前研究多假设背景度量是共形平坦的，本文放宽这一限制，考虑更一般的非共形平坦背景度量，扩展了现有理论。
AI.techniques: 使用渐近分析方法，研究具有渐近锥状结构的Lipschitz区域，通过切锥上的正解来逼近原问题的局部正解，建立最优估计。
AI.main_theorems: 证明对于具有渐近锥状结构的Lipschitz区域，奇异边界点处切锥的正解可以很好地逼近原问题的局部正解，推广了文献[10,12,26]的结果。
AI.significance: 将奇异Yamabe问题的渐近分析推广到非共形平坦背景度量情形，为理解奇异几何结构下的标量曲率方程提供了更一般的理论框架，对几何分析和偏微分方程理论有重要贡献。

title: Regularity for mixed-order nonlinear fractional equations with degenerate coefficients
summary: We consider a class of nonlinear integro-differential equations whose leading operator is obtained as a superposition of $(-Δ_{p})^{s}$ and $(-Δ_{p})^{t}$, where $0<s<t<1<p<\infty$, weighted via two possibly degenerate coefficients $a(\cdot,\cdot),b(\cdot,\cdot) \ge 0$. We prove local boundedness and Hölder regularity of its weak solutions under natural assumptions on the coefficients $a(\cdot,\cdot)$, $b(\cdot,\cdot)$ and the powers $s,t$, and $p$. Moreover, when $a(\cdot,\cdot) \equiv 1$, we also prove a Harnack inequality for weak solutions.

AI.tldr: 证明了加权双重分数阶p-Laplace算子方程弱解的局部有界性、Hölder正则性和Harnack不等式
AI.motivation: 研究一类非线性积分-微分方程，其主导算子由两个不同分数阶的p-Laplace算子$(-Δ_{p})^{s}$和$(-Δ_{p})^{t}$叠加而成，并通过可能退化的系数$a(\cdot,\cdot),b(\cdot,\cdot)$加权，旨在建立这类方程弱解的正则性理论
AI.techniques: 使用非线性积分-微分方程的正则性理论方法，包括局部有界性和Hölder正则性的证明技术，以及Harnack不等式的推导，需要处理双重分数阶算子和可能退化的系数带来的技术挑战
AI.main_theorems: 1) 在系数$a,b$和指数$s,t,p$的自然假设下，证明了弱解的局部有界性和Hölder正则性；2) 当$a≡1$时，进一步证明了弱解的Harnack不等式
AI.significance: 扩展了分数阶p-Laplace算子的正则性理论到双重分数阶加权情形，为研究更一般的非线性非局部算子方程提供了理论基础，在非局部变分问题和分数阶偏微分方程中有重要应用

title: The Time-Periodic Cahn-Hilliard-Gurtin System on the Half Space as a Mixed-Order System with General Boundary Conditions
summary: A well-posedness and maximal regularity result for the time-periodic Cahn-Hilliard-Gurtin system in the half space is proved. For this purpose, we introduce a novel class of complementing boundary conditions, extending the classical Lopatinskiĭ-Shapiro conditions from elliptic and parabolic theory to time-periodic mixed-order systems with general boundary conditions. Moreover, we show that the classical Lopatinskiĭ-Shapiro conditions are in general insufficient for well-posedness of mixed-order systems.

AI.tldr: 证明了半空间上时间周期Cahn-Hilliard-Gurtin系统的适定性和极大正则性结果，并引入了混合阶系统的新颖互补边界条件。
AI.motivation: 研究时间周期Cahn-Hilliard-Gurtin系统在半空间上的适定性问题，该问题涉及相分离动力学。经典Lopatinskiĭ-Shapiro条件对混合阶系统通常不足以保证适定性，需要发展新的边界条件理论。
AI.techniques: 引入了新颖的互补边界条件类，将经典Lopatinskiĭ-Shapiro条件从椭圆和抛物型系统推广到具有一般边界条件的时间周期混合阶系统；使用极大正则性理论和时间周期函数空间方法。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了半空间上时间周期Cahn-Hilliard-Gurtin系统的适定性和极大正则性；建立了混合阶系统的新互补边界条件理论，并证明经典Lopatinskiĭ-Shapiro条件对混合阶系统一般不足以保证适定性。
AI.significance: 扩展了边界条件理论到混合阶时间周期系统，为相场模型等应用提供了理论基础；揭示了混合阶系统与纯椭圆/抛物系统的本质差异，推动了偏微分方程边界值问题理论的发展。
